title: aotus subglauca
intro: Aotus subglauca, also known as the 'Subglauca tree', is a species of plant in the family Fabaceae. It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever and treating respiratory issues, and its extracts have been used in herbal preparations to aid in the treatment of these conditions. Aotus subglauca is often used in traditional medicine to make decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are applied topically to the affected area or taken orally to promote healing.
